case_title: MIGUEL SANTIAGO VS. NEW ALPHA THREE INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-03-2024 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MIGUEL SANTIAGO IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT SOUTH CITY TOW, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. COURT WAS INFORMED BY SMALL CLAIMS OF PLAINTIFF'S REJECTED PROOF OF SERIVCE AND CONTINUANCE REQUEST. JUDGE PRO TEM WAS INFORMED AND A CONTINUANCE WAS GRANTED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELLE MCGILL; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-26-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-26-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF MIGUEL SANTIAGO IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT NEW ALPHA THREE INC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANTIAGO, MIGUEL AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTH CITY TOW, INC.
